commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Manual maintainer review is needed because this draft creates a new Windows platform with auth, local-git, installer, startup, update, and CI surfaces; the concrete defects are listed, but ownership and security...; Needs attention: The diff needs security attention because it adds token/auth surfaces and a validation path that executes a mutable downloaded script; GitGuardian also reported prior secret expos... (sha=efd85699feb60d8236ead839b9a398ff11a6e8e7)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a .NET/WinForms Windows taskbar tray companion, Windows build/package/smoke/Crabbox scripts and CI, xUnit tests, docs, and a tray screenshot asset.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blockers from source inspection: the refresh continuation leaves the UI thread, git execution waits without a timeout/non-interactive environment, and the validation script executes a downloaded bootstrap. I did not run the Windows app locally in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual maintainer review is needed because this draft creates a new Windows platform with auth, local-git, installer, startup, update, and CI surfaces; the concrete defects are listed, but ownership and security disposition cannot be safely automated.

target.title: feat(windows): add taskbar tray companion
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a native Windows taskbar tray companion under `Windows/` with rich repository status rows, local git state, recent GitHub lists, traffic/repository heatmap/changelog summaries, account contribution totals with a compact heatmap preview, Actions queue/billing/cache/runner details, REST/GraphQL rate-limit bucket diagnostics, PR notifications with duplicate suppression, Issue Navigator browser preview/copy/open actions, preferences, named account profiles, filtered repository discovery and visibility controls, local branch switching, worktree creation/navigation, repository checkout, GitHub App OAuth, account-scoped Credential Manager token storage, tray logout, ETag cache, archive-backed issue/PR fallback, launch-at-login, update checks with Windows installer asset detection, and installer packaging.
- Add Windows build/package/smoke/Crabbox scripts, including TRX test artifacts, smoke JSON artifacts, and best-effort desktop screenshot capture, plus a Windows CI job.
- Document Windows setup and the remaining parity roadmap, including a checked-in Windows tray screenshot proof at `docs/assets/repobar-windows-tray-menu.png`.

## Validation
- `CRABBOX_PROVIDER=aws CRABBOX_TARGET=windows pnpm windows:crabbox`
- Crabbox run `run_575b8ad3755e`: validated tray logout support and active-account PAT/OAuth Credential Manager target coverage on Windows Server 10.0.20348 with .NET SDK 8.0.421; `dotnet build` succeeded with 0 warnings/errors, `dotnet test` passed 65 tests and wrote `dist/windows/test-results/repobar-windows-tests.trx`, and `smoke_windows.ps1` published/launched `RepoBar.Windows.exe`, verified settings, and wrote a smoke JSON summary. Desktop screenshot capture was attempted but reported unavailable in the SSH runner (`CopyFromScreen`: invalid handle).
- Crabbox desktop lease `cbx_4c07eb04de40` / `blue-krill`: VNC became ready on the current head, Crabbox run `run_6eb0256647ad` built the synced checkout with 0 warnings/errors, passed 64 tests, published and launched `RepoBar.Windows.exe`, verified settings, and wrote a smoke JSON summary. `crabbox desktop launch` then started the current-head published app in the interactive Windows desktop session, and `crabbox screenshot` captured the taskbar; a sanitized crop is available as a secret gist: https://gist.github.com/vincentkoc/ec4abf082bdf3c280f0c940e36e1be8b.
- Crabbox run `run_054c7cc46bed`: validated worktree creation support on Windows Server 10.0.20348 with .NET SDK 8.0.421; `dotnet build` succeeded with 0 warnings/errors, `dotnet test` passed 64 tests and wrote `dist/windows/test-results/repobar-windows-tests.trx`, and `smoke_windows.ps1` published/launched `RepoBar.Windows.exe`, verified settings, and wrote a smoke JSON summary. Desktop screenshot capture was attempted but reported unavailable in the SSH runner (`CopyFromScreen`: invalid handle).
- Crabbox run `run_19eb7d9ac844`: validated repository checkout support on Windows Server 10.0.20348 with .NET SDK 8.0.421; `dotnet build` succeeded with 0 warnings/errors, `dotnet test` passed 63 tests and wrote `dist/windows/test-results/repobar-windows-tests.trx`, and `smoke_windows.ps1` published/launched `RepoBar.Windows.exe`, verified settings, and wrote a smoke JSON summary. Desktop screenshot capture was attempted but reported unavailable in the SSH runner (`CopyFromScreen`: invalid handle).
- Crabbox run `run_222e382e42cd`: validated local branch-switching menu support on Windows Server 10.0.20348 with .NET SDK 8.0.421; `dotnet build` succeeded with 0 warnings/errors, `dotnet test` passed 62 tests and wrote `dist/windows/test-results/repobar-windows-tests.trx`, and `smoke_windows.ps1` published/launched `RepoBar.Windows.exe`, verified settings, and wrote a smoke JSON summary. Desktop screenshot capture was attempted but reported unavailable in the SSH runner (`CopyFromScreen`: invalid handle).
- Crabbox run `run_ae386b4c0906`: validated Windows installer update targeting on Windows Server 10.0.20348 with .NET SDK 8.0.421; `dotnet build` succeeded with 0 warnings/errors, `dotnet test` passed 61 tests and wrote `dist/windows/test-results/repobar-windows-tests.trx`, and `smoke_windows.ps1` published/launched `RepoBar.Windows.exe`, verified settings, and wrote a smoke JSON summary. Desktop screenshot capture was attempted but reported unavailable in the SSH runner (`CopyFromScreen`: invalid handle).
- Crabbox run `run_e96f84590bc8`: Windows Server 10.0.20348, .NET SDK 8.0.421, `dotnet build` succeeded with 0 warnings/errors, `dotnet test` passed 60 tests and wrote `dist/windows/test-results/repobar-windows-tests.trx`, `smoke_windows.ps1` published and launched `RepoBar.Windows.exe`, verified the generated settings file, and wrote a smoke JSON summary. Desktop screenshot capture was attempted but reported unavailable in the SSH runner (`CopyFromScreen`: invalid handle).
- Crabbox run `run_1ae103944260`: validated PR notification duplicate suppression with 60 passing tests and smoke launch/settings verification.
- Crabbox run `run_004307a2420a`: validated rich repository row labels with 59 passing tests and smoke launch/settings verification.
- Crabbox run `run_3540f873ad1e`: validated filtered repository discovery with 57 passing tests and smoke launch/settings verification.
- Crabbox run `run_c1bef43d2e2e`: validated REST/GraphQL rate-limit bucket aggregation with 53 passing tests and smoke launch/settings verification.
- Crabbox run `run_acb351737982`: validated the Issue Navigator browser preview/copy/open slice with 52 passing tests and smoke launch/settings verification.
- Crabbox run `run_e79156a94a5d`: validated the account contribution heatmap summary with 52 passing tests and smoke launch/settings verification.
- Crabbox desktop lease `cbx_ff017993e317` / `amber-crab`: VNC became ready, publish run `run_e375410aab14` produced the Windows app, `crabbox desktop launch` started the published `RepoBar.Windows.exe` in the interactive Windows session, and `crabbox screenshot` captured the open notification-area menu. The sanitized crop is checked in at `docs/assets/repobar-windows-tray-menu.png`.
- Earlier Crabbox run `run_92d7398bdcde`: validated the TRX test artifact path, combined GitHub/local status coverage, and smoke launch/settings verification.
- Earlier Crabbox run `run_db7b36899b00`: validated the archive-backed issue/PR fallback with 52 passing tests and smoke launch/settings verification.
- Earlier Crabbox run `run_c168edc023e0`: validated GitHub App OAuth + named account profile work with 50 passing tests and smoke launch/settings verification.

## Notes
- This is a draft because Windows is now end-to-end build/test/smoke validated for the implemented tray surface, OAuth, account profiles, rich repository rows, filtered repository discovery, local branch switching, worktree creation/navigation, repository checkout, archive-backed issue/PR fallback, combined GitHub/local status coverage, account heatmap summary, Actions queue/billing/cache/runner details, REST/GraphQL rate-limit bucket diagnostics, Issue Navigator preview, PR notification duplicate suppression, update-check installer asset detection, tray logout, and desktop tray/menu proof, but not true full macOS feature parity yet.
- The SSH smoke still cannot take an in-process WinForms screenshot on the Crabbox image; the durable UI proof uses Crabbox's VNC framebuffer capture instead, which is the correct layer for interactive desktop evidence.
target.author: vincentkoc
